message:
fix: address 10 user-review findings — offset, limit, column validation, errors

Bugs fixed:
- offset() pagination now works (was completely ignored in assembleRows)
- limit(0) returns 0 rows (was returning all rows due to falsy check)
- limit(-1) throws "limit() must be non-negative"
- groupBy + sort on aggregate alias now sorts correctly (defer sort
  until after aggregation instead of sorting pre-aggregation rows)
- select/filter on non-existent column throws COLUMN_NOT_FOUND with
  available column names listed

DX improvements:
- Invalid file format errors now throw QueryModeError with INVALID_FORMAT
- append() on Parquet file throws clear error instead of ENOTDIR
- cacheHit field defaults to false (was undefined on non-cached results)
- offset() works with and without limit(), with and without sort()
